# Tandoori Corner

> Tandoori Corner is a North Indian restaurant and TCB Bar inside Balestier Plaza, Singapore. Established in 2008, it serves alfresco dining, tandoori grills, evening cocktails, home delivery, and catering.

## Location & Contact

- Address: 400 Balestier Road #01-12 Balestier Plaza, Singapore 329802
- Phone: +65 9862 7334
- Email: tandooricorner@singnet.com.sg
- Website: https://tandooricorner.sg
- Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/jE9ppAZ8BDcoJHZY9

## Hours

- Lunch: 12:00 - 14:45 daily
- Dinner & TCB Bar: 18:00 - 21:45 daily

## Pages

- [Home](https://tandooricorner.sg/): Overview, daily offers, signature dishes, Google reviews, and table booking.
- [Menu](https://tandooricorner.sg/menu): Full North Indian menu — chef signatures, tandoori grills, curries, biryanis, breads, desserts, TCB Bar drinks.
- [Order Online](https://tandooricorner.sg/order): Browse the menu and place pickup or home delivery orders.
- [Catering](https://tandooricorner.sg/catering): Silver, Gold and Platinum North Indian catering packages for Singapore events.
- [Build Your Own Catering Menu](https://tandooricorner.sg/catering/build): Custom catering menu builder for party and corporate event quotes.
- [Silver Catering Package](https://tandooricorner.sg/catering/silver): Intimate North Indian catering package from $24 per guest.
- [Gold Catering Package](https://tandooricorner.sg/catering/gold): Crowd-favourite North Indian catering package from $34 per guest.
- [Platinum Catering Package](https://tandooricorner.sg/catering/platinum): Full-feast North Indian catering package from $46 per guest.
- [Private Events](https://tandooricorner.sg/private-events): Book TCB Bar event space for birthdays, corporate gatherings, celebrations and private dining.
- [Contact](https://tandooricorner.sg/contact): Call, WhatsApp, get directions, confirm opening hours, or reserve a table.
- [Gallery](https://tandooricorner.sg/gallery): Food, restaurant, TCB Bar, catering, and private event photos.
- [Reviews](https://tandooricorner.sg/reviews): Guest reviews and links to review platforms.
- [Our Story](https://tandooricorner.sg/story): History, team, gallery, press features.

## Primary Actions

- Book a table: https://tandooricorner.sg/#reservation
- Order online: https://tandooricorner.sg/order
- Book event space: https://tandooricorner.sg/private-events
- Request catering: https://tandooricorner.sg/catering
- Build a custom catering menu: https://tandooricorner.sg/catering/build

## What We're Known For

- 24-hour-marinated tandoori meats and seafood
- Silken North Indian curries (OG Butter Chicken, Saag Mutton)
- The TCB Bar — Tandoori Corner's evening cocktail and beer-fest bar
- Pet-friendly alfresco balcony at Balestier Plaza
- Lunch thali sets, catering, and home delivery across Singapore
